case_title: PATEL, RAMESH C. vs. COLLINS, BARBARA et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, RAMESH C. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-31-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 220 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON APR-07-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE PRO TEM:BRIAN DINDAY/CLERK:ECLAVERIA C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL MR. ARNOLD EVJI.
